title: The Iron Fangs - Cybernetic Vampire Short Story
content:
The Iron Fangs
A Short Story of a Cybernetically Enhanced Vampire
Created by Bug9519 using Copilot in Microsoft Word.
Licensed: CC-BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

In the heart of a rain-soaked Melbourne night, where neon lights flickered off puddles on the footpath, Viktor stalked the empty alleyways. The city hummed with the symphony of data streams and distant trams, but Viktor was not your garden-variety vampire. His crimson eyes glimmered with a subtle, synthetic light, and beneath his trench coat, the faint whir of servos accompanied every move he made.

Once, centuries ago, Viktor had relied solely on his supernatural abilities: the speed, the strength, the hunger. But technology caught up, as it always does. The hunters grew clever. UV drones patrolled the rooftops, while thermal sensors tracked the cold-blooded through the city’s sprawl. It was only a matter of time before the predators became the prey.
After a close call in a backstreet near the servo, Viktor struck a deal with a rogue bioengineer—part scientist, part artist, all genius. The upgrades were painful, even for an immortal. Titanium bones reinforced his fragile ancient frame. Nano-fibres laced through his muscles, boosting his strength beyond even the oldest legends of his kind. Most impressively, his fangs could now retract into a set of sharpened alloy tips, strong enough to pierce even the latest composite body armour.

Tonight, Viktor’s target was not a hapless commuter or a night-shift worker. He hunted the hunters themselves—a shadowy syndicate who trafficked in rare blood. As he leapt over a chain-link fence and landed without a sound, Viktor activated his optical implants. The world turned blue and gold, highlighting heartbeats through brick and metal.

He found the syndicate’s den above a shuttered chemist, guarded by thugs with cybernetic arms and mean stares. They never saw him coming. With a blur of motion and the hiss of servo-motors, Viktor incapacitated them, his alloy fangs glinting as he fed. He left them alive—barely—knowing that fear was a more potent message than death.

As dawn approached, Viktor vanished into the urban maze, a legend for the new age: part monster, part machine, all survivor beneath the Australian night sky.

title: install_fonts_v2.sh
content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

### ---------------------------------------------------------
### Directories
### ---------------------------------------------------------

NERD_BASE="/usr/share/fonts/nerdfonts"
LOCAL_BASE="/usr/share/fonts/local"

sudo mkdir -p "$NERD_BASE"
sudo mkdir -p "$LOCAL_BASE"

TMP_DIR="/tmp/font-installer"
mkdir -p "$TMP_DIR"


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### Nerd Fonts (Mono TTF)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

TTF_FONTS=(
    "0xProto"
    "AdwaitaMono"
    "BitstreamVeraSansMono"
    "CascadiaCode"
    "DejaVuSansMono"
    "IBMPlexMono"
    "Mononoki"
    "FiraCode"
    "Hack"
    "IntelOneMono"
    "JetBrainsMono"
    "Meslo"
    "Noto"
    "Recursive"
    "SpaceMono"
)

### ---------------------------------------------------------
### Nerd Fonts (OTF)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

OTF_FONTS=(
    "AtkinsonHyperlegibleMono"
    "CodeNewRoman"
    "Hermit"
    "GeistMono"
)

echo "Installing Nerd Fonts into: $NERD_BASE"

### ---------------------------------------------------------
### 1. Install TTF-based Nerd Fonts (Mono variants only)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

for FONT in "${TTF_FONTS[@]}"; do
    ZIP="${TMP_DIR}/${FONT}.zip"
    FONT_DIR="${NERD_BASE}/${FONT}"
    URL="https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/releases/latest/download/${FONT}.zip"

    echo "Downloading $FONT..."
    sudo wget -q --show-progress "$URL" -O "$ZIP"

    echo "Extracting *NerdFontMono*.ttf..."
    sudo mkdir -p "$FONT_DIR"
    sudo unzip -j "$ZIP" "*NerdFontMono*.ttf" -d "$FONT_DIR" >/dev/null
done


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### 2. Install OTF-based Nerd Fonts
### ---------------------------------------------------------

for FONT in "${OTF_FONTS[@]}"; do
    ZIP="${TMP_DIR}/${FONT}.zip}"
    FONT_DIR="${NERD_BASE}/${FONT}"
    URL="https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/releases/latest/download/${FONT}.zip"

    echo "Downloading $FONT (OTF)..."
    sudo wget -q --show-progress "$URL" -O "$ZIP"

    echo "Extracting *.otf..."
    sudo mkdir -p "$FONT_DIR"
    sudo unzip -j "$ZIP" "*.otf" -d "$FONT_DIR" >/dev/null
done


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### 3. Install Inter (Inter-*.ttf → /usr/share/fonts/local)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

echo "Installing Inter..."
INTER_ZIP="${TMP_DIR}/inter.zip"

sudo wget -q --show-progress \
  "https://github.com/rsms/inter/releases/download/v4.1/Inter-4.1.zip" \
  -O "$INTER_ZIP"

sudo unzip -j "$INTER_ZIP" "extras/ttf/Inter-*.ttf" -d "$LOCAL_BASE" >/dev/null


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### 4. Install Office Code Pro (.ttf → /usr/share/fonts/local)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

echo "Installing Office Code Pro..."
OCP_ZIP="${TMP_DIR}/officecodepro.zip"

sudo wget -q --show-progress \
  "https://globalfonts.pro/global_files/64677722a717112392dab2d4/office-code-pro.zip" \
  -O "$OCP_ZIP"

sudo unzip -j "$OCP_ZIP" "*.ttf" -d "$LOCAL_BASE" >/dev/null


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### 5. Install SF Mono (.otf → /usr/share/fonts/nerdfonts/SFMono)
### ---------------------------------------------------------

echo "Installing SF Mono..."
SF_DIR="${NERD_BASE}/SFMono"
SF_ZIP="${TMP_DIR}/sfmono.zip"

sudo mkdir -p "$SF_DIR"

sudo wget -q --show-progress \
  "https://github.com/epk/SF-Mono-Nerd-Font/archive/refs/tags/v18.0d1e1.0.zip" \
  -O "$SF_ZIP"

sudo unzip -j "$SF_ZIP" "*.otf" -d "$SF_DIR" >/dev/null


### ---------------------------------------------------------
### Final Cleanup + Font Cache
### ---------------------------------------------------------

echo "Cleaning up temporary files..."
sudo rm -rf "$TMP_DIR"

echo "Updating font cache..."
sudo fc-cache -fv

echo "All fonts installed successfully."
